name: freedomdesk
description: FreedomDesk marketing site, lead capture, and intelligence prototypes

scripts.build: npm run preview:intelligence-inbox && npm run preview:my-day && npm run preview:morning-brief && npm test
scripts.test: node --test src/engine/prompt-context-builder.test.js && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/conversation/psychology.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/conversation/reasoning.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/events/operationalEvent.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/actions/actionModel.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/conversation/proofLoop.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/practice-brain/practiceBrain.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/practice-improvement/improvementEngine.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/practice-improvement/scheduleOpportunity.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/practice-improvement/phoneOpportunity.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/practice-improvement/decisionArbitration.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/practice-memory/practiceMemory.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/reflection-engine/reflection.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/telephony/completedCall.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/telephony/callSession.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/telephony/conversationalAly.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/telephony/callReplay.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --test src/telephony/callVariationEval.test.ts && node --test scripts/morning-brief-preview.test.js && node --test scripts/my-day-preview.test.js && node --test scripts/intelligence-inbox-preview.test.js && node --test scripts/decision-flow.test.js && node --test scripts/twilio-voice.test.js && node --test scripts/conversation-relay.test.js
